grouping.leakage_note: A random row split would put the SAME patient in train and test (hard rule 2). Split with GroupShuffleSplit on patient_nbr.

breakdown.label: Expired at home. Medicaid only, hospice.
Expired in a medical facility. Medicaid only, hospice.
Expired, place unknown. Medicaid only, hospice.

discharge_filter.rule: Hard rule 5: expired/hospice patients cannot be readmitted — drop them so the target is well-defined and the model is not trained on structurally-impossible negatives.

encounter_id.name: encounter_id
notes: Row/patient key — not a feature. patient_nbr drives the GROUP split.

patient_nbr.name: patient_nbr
notes: Row/patient key — not a feature. patient_nbr drives the GROUP split.
